facebook.caption: Tucked along the quieter shores of Ong Lang, Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phu Quoc earns its 4.7-star reputation with ease. Stylish rooms, two on-site restaurants, a sprawling outdoor pool, and a full spa mean you rarely need to leave the property. If you are looking for a polished beach escape away from the busier southern end of the island, this is a strong pick. Practical tip: Ong Lang Beach is calmer and less crowded than Bãi Trường, which makes it especially lovely for a morning swim.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the morning light hit that outdoor pool and suddenly your inbox feels very far away. Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phu Quoc packages up chic rooms, beachside calm, two restaurants, and a spa into one effortless stay on Ong Lang's quiet shore. Rated 4.7 from over 4,700 reviews. This one speaks for itself.

instagram.caption: Quiet beach, chic rooms, a spa, and two restaurants all in one place. Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phu Quoc on Ong Lang shore is your escape from the crowds, rated 4.7 from 4,700+ guests. Tip: Ong Lang Beach is calmer than Bãi Trường. Perfect for slow mornings.
instagram.video_caption: Pool. Beach. Spa. Repeat. Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phu Quoc is doing resort life right on the calm shores of Ong Lang. Rated 4.7 from 4,700+ guests and honestly, you can see why.
